canonical_data_payload_preview.name: Café Colmado
canonical_data_payload_preview.address: 286 Broome St, New York, NY 10002, USA
canonical_data_payload_preview.tagline: A warm corner café in the heart of the Lower East Side
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: A cozy Lower East Side café featuring warm industrial lighting, decorative framed photos, and a welcoming counter-service layout. The space presents an intimate daytime environment suited for coffee breaks and quiet work sessions, reflecting its well-regarded neighborhood status with a 4.6 rating across 291 reviews.

canonical_data_payload_preview.name: RHYTHM ZERO | WEST VILLAGE
canonical_data_payload_preview.address: 328 Bleecker St, New York, NY 10014, USA
canonical_data_payload_preview.tagline: Minimalist cafe sanctuary in the heart of the Village
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: Rhythm Zero occupies a West Village storefront with floor-to-ceiling wood paneling, paper lanterns, and a sculptural cactus anchoring the minimalist interior. High tables with two chairs each create intimate pockets for conversation or solitary focus, while framed artwork on the walls adds quiet creative energy. The space opens at 8AM daily, catering to Village locals seeking a calm respite.

editorial.description_short: A clean-lined West Village cafe with warm wood panels, curated artwork, and a singular cactus adding life to the minimalist space. Two-chair high tables create an intimate setting for slow mornings or quiet afternoon work.

canonical_data_payload_preview.name: Bakeri
canonical_data_payload_preview.tagline: Williamsburg's neighborhood bakery with heart and soul
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: Bakeri occupies a warm corner of Wythe Avenue in Williamsburg, where wood-paneled interiors and pendant lighting create an inviting backdrop for house-baked goods. The chalkboard specials and checkered tile floor evoke a classic neighborhood bakery, while nearly 700 reviews at 4.5 stars speak to its consistent quality and local devotion.

canonical_data_payload_preview.name: A&C Super
canonical_data_payload_preview.tagline: Bright Williamsburg mornings, the local way
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: A&C Super anchors itself in Williamsburg as a reliable daytime cafe, open daily from 8AM to 4PM with a straightforward menu built around quality espresso and neighborhood hospitality. The bright, window-forward interior creates a functional yet welcoming space that keeps regulars coming back.

canonical_data_payload_preview.name: Paris Baguette
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: Paris Baguette's Williamsburg location features a well-lit interior with mosaic tile floors, marble counters, and a full glass display case stocked with pastries and baked goods. The space maintains the chain's signature clean, bright aesthetic while fitting naturally into the Brooklyn neighborhood context.

canonical_data_payload_preview.name: maman
canonical_data_payload_preview.address: 800 Washington St, New York, NY 10014, USA
canonical_data_payload_preview.tagline: A lush West Village café with roses overhead and Parisian soul
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: Maman occupies a refined corner of the West Village near Meatpacking, its interior defined by abundant greenery, white roses suspended overhead, and decorative rose wall murals that create a lush, romantic atmosphere. Bistro seating and a prominent beverage refrigerator complete the café's intimate, French-inspired aesthetic, open daily from early morning through 6 PM.

editorial.tagline: Portland roots, NYC craft—coffee as it should be.
editorial.description: Stumptown occupies a well-designed interior within the Ace Hotel building on 29th Street, featuring exposed wood, a prominent espresso setup, and globe pendant lighting that creates a warm, inviting space suited for both focused work and casual hangs.
editorial.description_short: Specialty coffee roaster with roots in Portland, now settled in NoMad's Ace Hotel building. Espresso-focused menu meets a well-designed interior built for lingering.

canonical_data_payload_preview.name: Pura Vida - NoMad
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: Wide interior shot reveals a bright café with white-painted brick, exposed beams, woven pendant lights, and lush hanging greenery framing bistro seating with active diners. A glass pastry display case anchors the space, consistent with the café's all-day food and beverage positioning.

canonical_data_payload_preview.name: Nick + Sons Bakery
canonical_data_payload_preview.tagline: Artisan loaves and espresso in a Brooklyn bakery
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: The interior reveals Brooklyn industrial character: a brick service counter, tin ceiling with exposed conduit lighting, wooden tables, and bread shelves stocked with fresh baked goods alongside espresso equipment. Morning-only hours (7:30 AM–2:00 PM) reinforce its identity as a neighborhood breakfast and coffee spot.

create unique index if not exists venue_images_venue_photo_reference_uidx
on venue_images (venue_id, photo_reference);
